G0.label:
case swap
α : Type u_1
xs ys : List α
P : α → Prop
xs✝ ys✝ : List α
x✝ y✝ : α
a✝ : xs✝ ↭ ys✝
a_ih✝ : Any P xs✝ → Any P ys✝
⊢ Any P (x✝ :: y✝ :: xs✝) → Any P (y✝ :: x✝ :: ys✝)

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
xs ys : List α
P : α → Prop
xs_1 ys_1 : List α
x y : α
a : xs_1 ↭ ys_1
a_ih : Any P xs_1 → Any P ys_1
⊢ Any P (x :: y :: xs_1) → Any P (y :: x :: ys_1)

G2.label:
case inl
α : Type u_1
xs ys : List α
P : α → Prop
xs_1 ys_1 : List α
x y : α
a : xs_1 ↭ ys_1
a_ih : Any P xs_1 → Any P ys_1
h : P x
⊢ P y ∨ P x ∨ Any P ys_1

G3.label:

α : Type u_1

x y : α
a : xs_1 ↭ ys_1
a_ih : Any P xs_1 → Any P ys_1
h : P y

G4.label:
case inr.inr
α : Type u_1
xs ys : List α
P : α → Prop
xs_1 ys_1 : List α
x y : α
a : xs_1 ↭ ys_1
a_ih : Any P xs_1 → Any P ys_1
h_2 : Any P xs_1
